title: Molecular Biotechnology Working Group
content:
Molecular Biotechnology Working Group

Research Focus

The Molecular Biotechnology working group works on investigating the biological and chemical properties of newly synthesized, novel or naturally occurring molecules by molecular biological, biotechnological and computational chemical methods.
